---
name: Decision tree
about: Propose or update a system design decision tree.
title: "Decision tree: "
labels: ["type:decision-tree"]
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

Which decision should this tree help a reader make?

## Deliverable

Target path:

```text
docs/[section]/[decision-tree].md
```

## Decision Inputs

- Requirement or constraint that starts the decision:
- Options to compare:
- Known non-goals:

## Acceptance Checklist

- [ ] The tree starts from a requirement, constraint, or failure mode.
- [ ] A Mermaid flowchart is included when it improves understanding.
- [ ] Each major branch has a clear outcome.
- [ ] The page explains how to use the result after the tree.
- [ ] Trade-offs are explicit for the main outcomes.
- [ ] Common mistakes are included.
- [ ] At least one original example is included.
- [ ] Related requirement, component, method, or practice pages are linked.
- [ ] Content follows `CONTENT_GUARDRAILS.md` and uses original diagrams and examples.
- [ ] Available checks are run, or missing checks are noted.
